scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:octo-packages && npm run build:examples && npm run build:actions
scripts.build:packages: tsc -b packages/otlpjson packages/query packages/views packages/adapters packages/stardb packages/o11ytsdb packages/o11ylogsdb packages/o11ytracesdb --force
scripts.build:octo-packages: npm run build --workspace=@octo11y/core && npm run build --workspace=@benchkit/format && npm run build --workspace=@benchkit/chart && npm run build --workspace=@benchkit/adapters
scripts.build:examples: npm run build --workspace @otlpkit/example-chartjs && npm run build --workspace @otlpkit/example-echarts && npm run build --workspace @otlpkit/example-recharts && npm run build --workspace @otlpkit/example-uplot && npm run build --workspace @otlpkit/example-demo
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck:octo-packages && npm run typecheck:examples && npm run typecheck:actions && npm run typecheck:site
scripts.typecheck:packages: tsc -b packages/otlpjson packages/query packages/views packages/adapters packages/stardb packages/o11ytsdb packages/o11ylogsdb packages/o11ytracesdb --pretty false --force
scripts.typecheck:octo-packages: npm run build --workspace=@octo11y/core && npm run build --workspace=@benchkit/format && npm run lint --workspace=@octo11y/core && npm run lint --workspace=@benchkit/format && npm run lint --workspace=@benchkit/chart && npm run lint --workspace=@benchkit/adapters
scripts.typecheck:examples: npm run typecheck --workspace @otlpkit/example-chartjs && npm run typecheck --workspace @otlpkit/example-echarts && npm run typecheck --workspace @otlpkit/example-recharts && npm run typecheck --workspace @otlpkit/example-uplot && npm run typecheck --workspace @otlpkit/example-demo
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm pack --workspace @otlpkit/otlpjson --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @otlpkit/query --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @otlpkit/views --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @otlpkit/adapters --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @octo11y/core --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @benchkit/format --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @benchkit/chart --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @benchkit/adapters --dry-run
scripts.publint: publint run packages/otlpjson --strict && publint run packages/query --strict && publint run packages/views --strict && publint run packages/adapters --strict
scripts.attw: attw --pack packages/otlpjson --profile esm-only --format table && attw --pack packages/query --profile esm-only --format table && attw --pack packages/views --profile esm-only --format table && attw --pack packages/adapters --profile esm-only --format table
scripts.check:release: npm run build:packages && npm run pack:dry-run && npm run publint && npm run attw
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.octo11y:check: npm run octo11y:test && npm run octo11y:lint
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run octo11y:check
scripts.clean: rm -rf coverage .site playwright-report test-results packages/*/dist examples/*/dist packages/*/.tsbuildinfo actions/*/lib && npm run clean:octo11y
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && rm -rf node_modules octo11y/node_modules
